properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I take the bread of life Broken for all my sin Your body crucified To make me whole again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will recall the cup Poured out in sacrifice To trade this sinner's end For Your new covenant

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hallelujah I'll live my life in remembrance Hallelujah Your promise I won't forget

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'll walk salvation's road With fear and trembling Your way borne as my own As Christ is formed in me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah I'll live my life in remembrance Hallelujah Your promise I won't forget

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: If ever I should lose my way If ever I deny Your grace Remind me of the price You paid Hallelujah I'll live in remembrance

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: You've been so so good to me You've been so so good to me Oh to think where I would be If not for You If not for You :/

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: As far as heights reach from the depths As far as east is from the west So far Your grace has carried me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Until I see You face to face Until at last I've won my race Remind me Youʼre not finished yet

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Hallelujah Hallelujah Hallelujah I'll live in remembrance
